event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1993-1997) merged duplicate event f446ec5c-64be-5a4b-a266-57753e8797a6 ("Mountain Goat Run Sammamish Orienteering Club"). Reason: announcement/results duplicate with title drift. Notes: The June 26 announcement calls it a "Billygoat run" while the results heading calls it Mountain Goat Run; both refer to the same Cle Elum Ridge event.
